trans-d_ug_545: I might come back late tonight because I have work at the company, you wait and have dinner.
trans-d_ug_256: In that case, which type do you like
trans-d_ug_633: 2 months have passed since the exam finished, why haven't you given us the results yet?
trans-d_ug_288: 6 or 7 days a week is too much for me to go to work.
trans-d_ug_142: 1. I understand. 2. Would you let me get out of the car because I was in pain?
trans-d_ug_516: 谢谢 (Xièxiè), could you please let me in
trans-d_ug_597: Hurry up and quickly look for it, the taxi driver is still waiting for us below
trans-d_ug_366: 1 more minute, still no one has come.
trans-d_ug_488: I like everything except for ice skating, which you enjoy.
trans-d_ug_310: What are we going to eat today?
trans-d_ug_497: What time is the earliest flight to Shanghai today?
trans-d_ug_523: The wind last night was really strong, it felt like winter was coming.
trans-d_ug_41: What kind of flowers do you say? Now I'm old and withered, I've lost my taste buds, what would be good to eat for lunch?
trans-d_ug_394: Do you have time tonight? A new restaurant has opened next to the school, are you interested?
